lessons.title: Creation
objectives: Understand that God created the world.
lessons.contentHtml: In the beginning, God created the heavens and the earth. Use visuals and sounds to show the wonder of creation.
lessons.teacherNotes: Invite the children to describe their favourite part of God's creation. Encourage participation with props.

quizzes.prompt: God created light on the first day.

lessons.title: Noah's Ark
objectives: Recognise the rainbow as God's promise.
lessons.contentHtml: Noah built the ark just as God instructed. Explore obedience and God's promises with colourful crafts.
lessons.teacherNotes: Use animal figurines to retell the story. Discuss promises that the children can keep.

quizzes.prompt: What sign did God give as a promise after the flood?
